a.xlink:title: Handles metadata operations and provides utilities for managing metadata-related tasks.
Defines the base template class for event data representation and manipulation.
Defines the selection_template base class for event selection criteria.
Defines the io class for handling input/output operations, primarily with ROOT and HDF5 files.
Defines the analysis class, the central orchestrator for physics analysis tasks.
Implementation of event_template class methods for physics event data handling.
Defines the graph_template class and graph_t structure for graph-based analysis.
Implementation of the event_template class methods.
Implementation of the io class methods.
